rag_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
References in AGREE contracts must resolve to visible AADL features or declared helpers in the same annex
generic_rules: Fix root unresolved references before adding new architecture elements
Use only visible identifiers and declared helpers in AGREE contracts
AGREE scalar types must be int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified names
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings
anti_patterns: Adding assume/guarantee clauses in implementation scopes instead of component types
Referencing undefined identifiers or package-qualified types not present in the model
